---
name: Bug report
about: Tool returning wrong data or an error
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Tool / endpoint**
e.g. `get_sakura_spots`, `/api/koyo/all-spots`

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**What you expected**
What the correct response should have been.

**Date and time (JST)**
Bloom data is time-sensitive. Include the date/time you saw the issue.

**Steps to reproduce**
```
Tool call or curl command that triggered the bug
```

**Additional context**
Any other relevant info.
